title: Montana's New Paintings [Resourcepack]
description:
Uses the new datapack-driven method to make custom paintings in MC (No Mods)
Requires: https://modrinth.com/datapack/montanas-new-paintings
body:
This datapack/resourepack adds a brand new painting into MC: My version of Isle of the Dead by Arnold Böcklin. This pack is currently a test of the new system, but the hope is to add more new custom paintings! 
### Requirements
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/montanas-new-paintings](https://modrinth.com/datapack/montanas-new-paintings)
# Links
If you have any suggestions, or other questions, feel free to contact me here
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/MontanaPersonal
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/montanoceratops.bsky.social
- Mastodon:@Montanoceratops@ecoevo.social
- Tumblr:https://www.tumblr.com/blog/montanoceratops
- Discord: @montanoceratops
# For Creators
If you want to make a painting pack of your own, you are free to use the file structure of this one as a base.
However, do NOT repost this pack's content without my permission.
-Montanoceratops
